# Agent Reference

| Skill | Command | Model | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| brainstorm | `/runway brainstorm [feature]` | opus | 4-stage adaptive Q&A with contradiction pushback that produces (or updates) SESSION.md. |
| init | `/runway init` | sonnet | Entry point — ingest attached files, pick a model, write the project template, detect existing projects. |
| launch | `/runway launch` | sonnet | Assemble the context packet and spawn Claude Code as a sub-agent via the Agent SDK. |
| mission-control | `/runway status` | sonnet | Status, docs, and completion modes — keeps DASHBOARD.md, CLAUDE.md, and docs current; manages parallelism. |
| orchestrate | `/runway orchestrate` | sonnet | Turn SESSION.md into PLAN.md — phases in dependency order with a valid DAG. |
| plan | `/runway plan` | opus | Turn a phase into a file-level blueprint — [S] embedded content, [L] 5-field specs. |
| recover | `/runway recover` | sonnet | Diagnose a failed phase (context vs complexity), re-prompt ×3, then escalate. |
| review | `/runway review` | sonnet | Validate a blueprint against the schemas; 3-attempt revision loop before escalation. |
